profile.name: Jan Liam E. Arias
profile.tagline: First-year CS student learning to build for the web, one line of code at a time.
profile.taglineHTML: First-year CS student learning to build for the web, one line of code at a time.
profile.availability: Open to learning opportunities and internships

about.background: I am a first-year Bachelor of Science in Computer Science student excited to learn how the web works and how to build for it. My journey into programming started with curiosity about how websites and apps are made — and that curiosity has only grown since. Right now, I am focused on building a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Java, while exploring how data flows through modern applications using JSON. I believe the best way to learn is by building, breaking, and fixing — and this portfolio is part of that journey.

projects.title: Personal Website (Multi-Page)
projects.description: A multi-page personal website with separate pages for Home, Blog, Projects, and Contact. Built with semantic HTML and linked together with a shared navigation. Includes a profile photo and screenshot. My first activity for the WebDev 1 course.

projects.title: McDonald's Landing Page
projects.description: A faithful recreation of the McDonald's Philippines landing page. Includes the McDelivery section, app store badges, social media icons, and multiple ad banners. Practiced working with images, SVGs, and complex layouts.

projects.title: Styled Product Page
projects.description: A product showcase page with a dedicated external stylesheet. Practiced linking CSS, styling product cards, and creating a clean, readable layout for e-commerce-style content.

projects.title: Interactive JavaScript App
projects.description: A web page with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript working together. Uses an external app.js file to add interactivity and dynamic behavior. Built as part of the JavaScript activities in the WebDev 1 course.

timeline.title: BS in Computer Science
timeline.description: Currently in my 1st year. Coursework includes introductory programming in Java, web development fundamentals, data structures, and discrete mathematics. Building a strong foundation in problem-solving and software development.

timeline.title: WebDev 1 — HTML & CSS Activities
timeline.description: Built multiple HTML pages and CSS stylesheets as course activities: a multi-page personal website, a McDonald's landing page recreation, product pages, and stylesheet experiments. Practiced semantic HTML, linking CSS, layouts, and working with images/SVGs.

timeline.title: WebDev 1 — JavaScript Activities
timeline.description: Progressed into JavaScript: added interactivity to web pages using external .js files, manipulated the DOM, and built small interactive apps. Culminated in a responsive, JSON-driven portfolio website as the final project.
